# Tasks.IsForbiddenTaskNotification method

Returns `true` when *method* is a notification kind that MUST NOT be sent for a task (§25.9, §25.10, R-25.9-a, R-25.10-g). Sending it for a task is a protocol violation.

```csharp
public static bool IsForbiddenTaskNotification(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The notification method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when the method is forbidden for tasks.
